game_loop.philosophy: Single run = 13 rooms per floor × 5 floors = 65 rooms maximum. Death = game over. Meta-progression through discoveries.

run_structure.victory_condition: Defeat The Infinitum boss on Floor 5

phase_2_exploration.name: Room Exploration
room_types: Locked Door (shop or mystery - requires key)
actions_in_room: Navigate (use permanent tools: Match, Rope, Blowtorch, Breaker Bar)
Collect (loot: coins, items, specialization books, artifacts)
Shop (vending machine - buy items with coins)
Choose (if multiple items, pick what to take)

phase_3_combat.name: Twin-Stick Combat
mechanics: Collect drops (automatic pickup or manual proximity)

phase_4_progression.name: Room Clear → Next Room
flow: Enter next room or backtrack (shop, secret, boss)

phase_5_floor_boss.name: Boss Encounter

boss_fight.unique_patterns: Each boss has specific attack patterns

phase_5_floor_boss.defeat: Lose all brains → Game Over (run ends)

transition.UI: Narrative message (e.g., 'Tectonic forces push you down...')
transition.state_transfer: All stats/items carry over to next floor
transition.new_shops: New vending machine with Floor 2 pricing

permanent_effects.specialization_book_collected: Added to codex permanently. Unlocks new combo.
permanent_effects.artifact_discovered: Added to loot pool for all future runs.
permanent_effects.boss_defeated: Unlocks next floor for future runs.

phase_8_endgame.name: Final Boss / Victory

challenge.patterns: Uses attacks from all previous bosses + adapts
challenge.difficulty: Extreme - requires mastery of all floor mechanics

victory.ending: Narrative: 'You understand. You return to the Lab, but changed.'
victory.stats_recorded: Run completion time, total brains used, coins collected

phase_8_endgame.defeat: Game Over. Return to main menu.

meta_progression.philosophy: Discovery system. What you find once, unlocks forever.

discovery_types.discovery: Find a 'Biology' book during a run
discovery_types.unlock: Biology is now available from start of ALL future runs
discovery_types.effect: Can start as Biologist if desired, or combine with other specs
discovery_types.progression: Collect all 34 specializations over multiple runs

discovery_types.unlock: Battery now appears in loot pools for all future runs
discovery_types.effect: Can equip Battery in any future run
discovery_types.progression: Collect all 5 base artifacts + 5+ combination artifacts

discovery_types.discovery: Equip Battery + Microscope together → creates Electron Microscope
discovery_types.unlock: Electron Microscope now available as base drop for all future runs
discovery_types.effect: Players who discover combo get it earlier than others

discovery_types.unlock: Floor 2 is now accessible in all future runs
discovery_types.progression: Unlock all 5 bosses, reach The Infinitum

what_it_tracks: Best run stats (fastest time, most brains remaining, most coins)
codex_system.visual: Menu showing all discoveries with 'locked' vs 'unlocked' status
codex_system.incentive: Completionists want to find all 34 specs + all artifact combos

example.first_run: Random artifacts, random specializations. 'What does Battery do?'
example.tenth_run: Player knows Battery = damage. Seeks out Battery + Microscope combo.
example.thirtieth_run: Player has discovered 20 artifact combos. Builds intentionally broken runs.

enemy_difficulty.philosophy: Enemies scale with floor, not player power
enemy_difficulty.floor_5: Extreme enemies, requires mastery + good artifacts

difficulty_variance.lucky_run: Find 3 early artifacts, 2 specialization books → trivialize Floor 3
difficulty_variance.unlucky_run: Find no artifacts, no books → struggle even on Floor 1
difficulty_variance.skill_matters: Good player can beat Floors 1-2 with no artifacts. Bad player struggles with any floor.

drop_rates_per_enemy.weapon_artifact: Very rare (~1% per enemy) unless you have 3+ collected

environmental_breaks.match_use: Reveals coins/items hidden in cracked walls

chest_contents.secret_room_chest: 50-100 coins, rare artifact or rare book

decision_1_shop_priority.scenario: At vending machine with 60 coins. Choose 1 of 3 items:
decision_1_shop_priority.option_a: Buy artifact (100 coins) - can't afford, skip
decision_1_shop_priority.option_b: Buy Blowtorch (60 coins) - access secret areas
decision_1_shop_priority.option_c: Buy Healing (40 coins) - save for next shop

decision_2_locked_door.scenario: Found 1 key. 2 locked doors ahead: shop or mystery?
decision_2_locked_door.option_a: Open shop - safe, guaranteed good loot
decision_2_locked_door.option_b: Open mystery - risky, but maybe rare artifact
decision_2_locked_door.option_c: Save key - might find another, or skip both

decision_3_artifact_swap.scenario: Have Battery (1.2 damage). Find Microscope (1.25 speed) + Lens (1.15 damage).
decision_3_artifact_swap.option_a: Keep Battery, equip Microscope (fast, still powerful)
decision_3_artifact_swap.option_b: Swap Battery for Lens (more focused damage)
decision_3_artifact_swap.option_c: Equip both (1/2 is Microscope, 1/2 is Lens - hybrid build)

decision_4_health_management.scenario: Have 3 brains left. Healing costs 40 coins. Enemy drops Burrito (+2 health).
decision_4_health_management.option_b: Save Burrito for later? (risky if you die)
decision_4_health_management.option_c: Spend coins on healing at shop - save Burrito

what_changes_each_run: Boss AI patterns (adaptive, learns your moves)
Locked door content (shop vs mystery, random per run)
what_stays_consistent: Boss health pools (same per floor across runs)
Specialization effects (Biology always has same debuff)

replayability.reason_1: Different loot = different build = different playstyle
replayability.reason_4: Player skill matters = same run can go very differently

loop_1_single_run.duration: 30-90 minutes per run (depending on skill + luck)
loop_1_single_run.goal: Reach Floor 5 boss or die trying

loop_2_meta_progression.reward: Full codex. Knowledge. Ability to build crazy combos.

loop_3_mastery.goal: Beat game with specific builds, fast times, etc.

run_failure_states.recovery_mechanics: None in MVP - death is permanent per run

upon_death.stats_saved: Run duration, floors cleared, items collected
upon_death.next_run: New run with same baseline stats (discovered items still unlocked)

run_failure_states.post_launch_features: Resurrection items, continue mechanics could be added later

time_to_completion.100_percent: 50-100 hours (unlock all specs, combos, beat all bosses multiple times)

session_structure.long_session: Unlimited runs, grinding for specific discoveries
session_structure.ideal_for: Lunch break (1 run), evening chill (3 runs), weekend binge (many runs)

win_conditions.immediate_win: Defeat The Infinitum, reach end credits
win_conditions.ultimate_win: Complete codex + beat all bosses + speedrun times

between_runs.main_menu: See codex (all discoveries), start new run
choices_available: View run statistics (best times, furthest floors)

new_run_begins.state_reset: Health back to 5, speed/damage back to 1.0
new_run_begins.state_carries: All discovered specializations/artifacts still in loot pools
new_run_begins.philosophy: Each run is a fresh start, but knowledge persists

milestone_1_first_boss.incentive: New floor = new enemies, new loot

milestone_2_first_combo.reward: Electron Microscope added to loot pool
milestone_2_first_combo.incentive: Combos are more powerful, unlock more combos

milestone_3_first_specialization.trigger: Collect any specialization book (Biology, Chemistry, etc.)
milestone_3_first_specialization.discovery: Player learns specs unlock new projectiles

milestone_4_broken_build.trigger: Find artifact + specialization combo that trivializes a floor
milestone_4_broken_build.incentive: Want to find more broken combos

milestone_5_full_codex.trigger: Unlock all 34 specializations + all artifact combinations

example_1_lucky_first_run.next_run_impact: All these items now in loot pool

example_2_unlucky_first_run.next_run_impact: Player learned: go slow, learn patterns, kite

example_3_mastery_run.strategy: Knew where to find artifacts, built intentional combos
example_3_mastery_run.victory: Beat The Infinitum, new personal best time
